attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
WSLSD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY, WSLSD.PARENT_SOL_SHIPMENT_DLVRY_KEY, WSLSD.INITIAL_PICKUP_DTM, WSLSD.DV_INITIAL_PICKUP_DT, WSLSD.SOURCE_CREATION_DTM, WSLSD.PLANNED_ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DTM, WSLSD.DV_SOURCE_CREATION_DT, WSLSD.DV_PLANNED_ULTIMATE_DROPOFF_DT, WSLSD.ASN_STATUS_CD, WSLSD.ASN_SENT_DTM, WSLSD.DV_ASN_SENT_DT, WSLSD.DELIVERY_STATUS_CD, WSLSD.PLANNED_FLG, WSLSD.PICKED_QTY, WSLSD.FREIGHT_TERMS_CD, WSLSD.SHIPPING_PRIORITY_CD, WSLSD.RU_BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME, WSLSD.SHIPPING_PREFERENCE_CD, WSLSD.RU_INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, WSLSD.SHIPPING_MODE_CD, WSLSD.REQUESTED_DTM, WSLSD.DV_REQUESTED_DT, WSLSD.SCHEDULED_DTM, WSLSD.RU_ORGN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME, WSLSD.DV_SCHEDULED_DT, WSLSD.RU_DSTN_STRTG_LGSTCS_CNTR_NAME, WSLSD.PICK_RELEASE_STATUS_CD, WSLSD.SUBINVENTORY_CD, WSLSD.DELIVERY_TYPE_CD, WSLSD.DELIVERY_TYPE, WSLSD.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT, WSLSD.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, WSLSD.DELIVERY_NAME, WSLSD.FRIEGHT_CAREER_ID, WSLSD.MOVE_ORDER_LINE_KEY, WSLSD.RU_TRUCK_NUM, WSLSD.RU_SHIPPED_QTY, WSLSD.RU_TRACKING_NUM, WSLSD.RU_GROSS_WEIGHT_AMT, WSLSD.RU_DELIVERY_DTM, WSLSD.RU_RECEIVE_AT_OSLC_DTM, WSLSD.RU_DV_RECEIVE_AT_DSLC_DT, WSLSD.RU_RECEIVE_AT_DSLC_DTM, WSLSD.RU_DV_RECEIVE_AT_OSLC_DT, WSLSD.RU_LPN_PARENT_FLG, WSLSD.RU_LICENSE_PLATE_NUM, WSLSD.RU_CONTAINER_NAME, WSLSD.RU_CONFIRM_DTM, WSLSD.RU_DV_CONFIRM_DT, WSLSD.RU_RETURN_TO_VENDOR_REASON_CD, 
WSLSD.EDW_CREATE_DTM, WSLSD.EDW_CREATE_USER, WSLSD.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, WSLSD.EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
WSLSD.SCHEDULED_ARRIVAL_DT,
WSLSD.DELIVERY_ID_INT
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL WSLSD
WHERE WSLSD.DML_TYPE='I' 
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL NK WHERE
WSLSD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY = NK.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY)
